title: Uruguayan Beef Stew
description: A hearty beef stew inspired by the flavors of Uruguay, slow-cooked to perfection.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef cubes on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the onion and garlic until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots and potatoes, cooking for 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth and bring to a boil.
Return the beef to the pot, cover, and transfer to the oven.
Braise for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
